stories.msg: We are all in one and out, which means, we are all connected. We care, communicate and collaborate. We do not waste, neither materials nor emotions nor energy. We circulate and regenerate together.
The value of people must never be touched. Every person deserves to be treated equally- which does not mean the same
People have a place to go when they are being discriminated. Marginalized people have special rights, assistance and financial help

People around the world must actively live to mantain peace, with respect and trust in equality. Everyone must do 5 hours per week for saving the nature and climate. All have to teach and learn empathy 2-3 hours per week. Gender pay gap is illegal.
Feminism is a norm, and must be accepted and respected by everyone, so that noone has the need to describe themselves as feminists anymore
Feminism is a norm, and must be accepted and respected by everyone, so that noone has the need to describe themselves as feminists anymore
